responsibilities: initialize the AcType mirror from SCType in InitAC
call CfsFSW/AcFsw on the FSW sample cadence
map AcType command fields back to 42 actuator objects in MapCmdsToActuators
adapter_boundary.direct_sc_access_policy: Direct SCType access belongs in this adapter layer; mode, sensor, control, and actuator modules should operate on struct AcType.

removed_or_absent_modules.note: Do not use AcApp.c as a default implementation boundary for the current workspace-local FSW shell.

state_machine_cycle: initialize per-spacecraft AcModeStateType when AC->CfsCtrl.Init is set
apply mode transition and AcOnModeEntry when NextMode differs from Mode
copy Mode into AC->Mode and advance FswTime
42fsw.c::MapCmdsToActuators copies AC commands to 42 actuator objects

current_internal_modes.name: ACQUIRE
current_internal_modes.default_behavior: rate damping plus coarse Earth-sensor roll/pitch feedback when available

current_internal_modes.name: TRACK
current_internal_modes.default_behavior: simple LVLH three-axis PD tracking using qbn/qln and wbn/wln

mode_fallbacks.condition: attitude validity lost or rate exceeds AC_TRACK_LOST_RATE

implemented_reference_sync: EphValid from nonzero position and velocity
coarse Earth-sensor surrogate ES.Valid/Roll/Pitch from -PosN transformed to body frame
supported_fsw_work: mission-specific preprocessing using fields already present in AcType
validity-flag logic using existing sensor mirror fields
filters or derived measurements that do not require new 42 truth outputs
unsupported_without_truth_model_extensio: new image or optical truth measurements
new sensor noise or visibility model implemented in native 42

supported_fsw_work: new application-layer control laws using existing AcType fields
gain and threshold changes in AcFswModules.h

implemented_dispatch: WheelProcessing allocates AC->Tcmd through wheel DistVec to Whl[i].Tcmd
MtbProcessing allocates AC->Mcmd through MTB DistVec to MTB[i].Mcmd
ThrProcessing projects AC->Fcmd onto positive thruster axes and writes thrust level and pulse width
unsupported_without_truth_model_extensio: new physical payload or optical actuator truth model

sidecar_boundary_note: AcFswModules.h includes AcOpticalPayload.h to preserve the current sidecar compile boundary. This does not imply native 42 optical payload support.

cfs_fsw_internal: mode transitions using existing AcType fields
control laws using existing AcType state, sensor mirrors, and command vectors
sensor preprocessing using existing 42-populated AcType fields
actuator allocation to existing wheel, MTB, thruster, or ideal actuator command fields
cross_boundary: requirements that need both FSW logic and sidecar or adapter support
requirements that consume optical sidecar outputs but do not add native 42 truth models
truth_model_extension: new image, optical, mechanism, or joint truth-model behavior
